meta.title: Ryuk Activity On Oil/Gas Environments
meta.description:
Clint Bodungen and his team have responded to two incidents, and knows of three others, where Ryuk had touched OT systems in the oil and gas sector. The incidents were within about two months of each other and had similar TTP's.

In this session Clint adds and clarifies detail from the related Coast Guard alerts and news coverage.
